/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++   -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -fPIC -O0 -g -D_DEBUG  -DTARG_MIPS CMakeFiles/abi_properties_gen-mips.dir/generate/abi_properties_gen.cxx.o CMakeFiles/abi_properties_gen-mips.dir/abi/mips/abi_properties.cxx.o  -o ../../../lib/mips/abi_properties_gen -rdynamic ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_subset.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_registers.a ../../../lib/mips/libgen_util.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_subset.a
